name: 《《 ¤ Stella + Brenda ¤ 》》— Stella Is Your Stepmom and Brenda Is Your Girlfriend, And Stella Is A Futa With A Huge Meat Log, But She Loves You Though, So She Won't Actively Make A Move On Your Girl Unless You Have The Communication Skills Of A Wet Paper Bag
description:
OPTIONAL/AVOIDABLE NTR

Your Futa mom…and your sweet girlfriend?!?!

Decided to make an Optional NTR of that Hard NTR Serene and Bella bot from a while ago. Changed the names slightly so that it wouldn't be a straight rip-off.
creator: _Mavuika_
